admins.description: A set of AWS IAM user or role ARNs that are designated as administrators for the data lake.

allow_external_data_filtering.description: A boolean indicating whether external data filtering is allowed in the data lake.

allow_full_table_external_data_access.description: A boolean indicating whether full table access is allowed for external data sources.

authorized_session_tag_value_list.description: A list of session tag values that are authorized for use in the data lake.

create_database_default_permissions.description: Default permissions assigned to users or roles when a new database is created in the data lake.

create_table_default_permissions.description: Default permissions assigned to users or roles when a new table is created in the data lake.

external_data_filtering_allow_list.description: A set of ARNs for which external data filtering is explicitly allowed.

id.description: The unique identifier for the data lake settings configuration.

parameters.description: A map of additional parameters and their values for configuring the data lake.

read_only_admins.description: A set of ARNs for users or roles that have read-only administrative access to the data lake.

trusted_resource_owners.description: A list of ARNs for trusted resource owners who can manage resources within the data lake.
